---
title: "Class 16: Downstream analysis"
author: "Paul Brencick (A17668863)"
format: html
---

## Background

We just finished up comparing our RNA-seq data via **Kallisto**! We did this all on a AWS instance within Unix as our computures and internet are way too slow to do it locally. We ran our data through these comparisons, then exported the results back to our PCS and now we are here. We can now use R and Bioconductor tools to explore this data. 

```{r}
library(tximport)

folders <- dir(pattern="SRR21568*")
samples <- sub("_quant", "", folders)
files <- file.path( folders, "abundance.h5" )
names(files) <- samples

txi.kallisto <- tximport(files, type = "kallisto", txOut = TRUE)
```
